entries.title: About the Course
entries.content: Continue to develop Latin reading proficiency through narratives about a Roman family and primary sources in Latin. Study Latin grammar, vocabulary, and culture.

entries.title: Placement & Combining Tips
entries.content:
Prerequisite: Level 3. Students just beginning Latin should start at Level 1 and consider the optional online course.

NOTE: for Levels 3-4, students work through materials at their own pace, and lesson plans are not provided. This course may be counted as 1 credit for High School.

rows.label: Latin 4
rows.books: Cambridge Latin Units 1-4 Teacher Manual (1 Year Digital Access), Cambridge Latin Unit 4 5th Ed., Cambridge Latin Unit 4 Online Resources
